water.name: Little Sur River
aliases: Little Sur River and tributaries above Coast Road

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(56) — Little Sur River and tributaries above Coast Road (Monterey Co.)
sources.quotedText: (56) Little Sur River and tributaries above Coast Road (Monterey Co.). Fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 31. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession. Nov. 16 through the Fri. preceding the last Sat. in Apr. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout.

sources.title: Western Rivers Conservancy — Little Sur River
sources.quotedText: The Little Sur is considered the Central Coast's most important and pristine spawning stream for threatened South-Central California Coast steelhead.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 272129, "Little Sur River", Stream, Monterey Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":272129,"gaz_name":"Little Sur River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Monterey"} — geometry multipoint; first point (Web Mercator -13569100.3297, 4346810.8901) converts to lon -121.893302, lat 36.334968, at the river's mouth at the Pacific Ocean near Point Sur, replacing the file's previous coordinate (-121.8200, 36.2950), which was off by roughly 8 km. Cross-checked against Wikipedia's infobox mouth coordinates (36°20'05"N 121°53'22"W = 36.33472, -121.88944), which match to within ~350 m.

end.verbatim: Friday preceding the last Saturday in April

parameters.note: Applies to Little Sur River and tributaries above Coast Road. From the fourth Saturday in May through October 31, harvest of hatchery trout/steelhead is allowed under the stated bag limit. From November 16 through the Friday preceding the last Saturday in April, the water remains open to fishing but with a 0 trout bag limit (catch-and-release only).

regulations.humanSummary: Open fourth Saturday in May through October 31 with harvest allowed; open November 16 through the Friday preceding the last Saturday in April as catch-and-release only
regulations.verbatimText: Fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 31. ... Nov. 16 through the Fri. preceding the last Sat. in Apr.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used year-round on this water (both the summer harvest season and the winter catch-and-release season).

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead per day, combined; 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead in possession, combined. Applies during the fourth Saturday in May through October 31 season.

regulations.humanSummary: Fourth Saturday in May through October 31: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily bag limit; 4 in possession
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.counting_rule: 0 trout may be kept; catch-and-release only during November 16 through the Friday preceding the last Saturday in April.

regulations.humanSummary: November 16 through the Friday preceding the last Saturday in April: 0 trout, catch-and-release only

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
